title: Annapolis
writer: John W. Krafft, Royal S. Pease, F. McGrew Willis
actors: Johnny Mack Brown, Hugh Allan, Jeanette Loff
plot: Bill is a young man who arrives at the Naval Academy in Annapolis. He is an incorrigible know-all, and emerges a sober man. Meanwhile, Bill is accused of a crime committed by his friend, and because he doesn't squeal, he wins the ...
